_meta.review_warning: AI-drafted v0. DO NOT USE IN PRODUCTION until reviewed by a qualified Vic WHS practitioner and approved. Demolition of any pre-1990 structure requires asbestos assessment before commencement.

activity_name: Demolition of existing landscape elements (paving, walls, structures)

hazards.title: Asbestos disturbance
hazards.risk: Pre-1990 sheet / pipe / vinyl / fibro disturbance releases respirable fibres

controls.title: Asbestos assessment by competent person for any pre-1990 material; if positive, licensed removalist (Class B for ≤ 10m²; Class A for friable)
Asbestos management plan in place before any disturbance

hazards.title: Uncontrolled collapse during demolition
hazards.risk: Wall / structure failing before planned demolition sequence

controls.title: Sequence planned top-down; supervisor briefed crew
Exclusion zone in fall arc of any structure being demolished

hazards.title: Strike of buried service during slab break-out
hazards.risk: Existing paving / slab break-out hitting unmapped services

hazards.title: Silica dust from breaking concrete / pavers
hazards.risk: Respirable silica from breaking, grinding, dry cutting

controls.title: Skid steer / mini excavator + bucket attachment for debris movement

tasks: Pre-start: confirm asbestos assessment complete for any pre-1990 material; result + plan on site.
Confirm BYDA + services located before any break-out.
Set exclusion zone around demolition area; signage at perimeter.
Toolbox: walk sequence with crew; agree communication signals with plant operator.
Demolish top-down; do not undercut supporting elements.
Water-suppress break-out work for dust control.
Load debris to skip via mechanical aid; segregate any suspected hazardous material.
Site clean at end of each day; cover any open services.
